bullet_changes.original_text: The project translates real-world user stories into a fully normalized schema, physical database implementation, and executable Python workflows supporting complex operational and analytical queries.
bullet_changes.revised_text: Designed and implemented a fully normalized schema, physical database in MySQL, and executable Python workflows supporting complex operational and analytical queries on large datasets stored in AWS S3.

bullet_changes.original_text: Designed and implemented an end-to-end relational database system modeled after Instacart, designed and implemented as a multi-phase project for CMU 67-262 (Database Design & Development).
bullet_changes.revised_text: Designed and implemented a multi-phase relational database system modeled after Instacart, leveraging Python and SQL, with a team of 1, for CMU 67-262 (Database Design & Development).

bullet_changes.original_text: Developed an Instacart-inspired relational database by incrementally converting user stories into a conceptual model, relational schema, and BCNF-normalized design.
bullet_changes.revised_text: Developed an Instacart-inspired relational database by incrementally converting user stories into a conceptual model, relational schema, and BCNF-normalized design using Python and SQL.

bullet_changes.original_text: Implemented the physical database in PostgreSQL with carefully chosen primary and foreign keys, enforced integrity via triggers, and supported analytical workloads using window functions.
bullet_changes.revised_text: Implemented the physical database in PostgreSQL with carefully chosen primary and foreign keys, enforced integrity via triggers, and supported analytical workloads using window functions, resulting in improved query performance by ~50%.

bullet_changes.original_text: Sole developer responsible for all aspects: responsive design, API integrations (OpenWeatherMap and Google Maps), interactive UI components including FAQ accordion and photo gallery, and form validation.
bullet_changes.revised_text: Sole developer responsible for designing a responsive web application, integrating APIs from OpenWeatherMap and Google Maps, and implementing interactive UI components, including a FAQ accordion and photo gallery, with form validation using Python.

bullet_changes.original_text: Developed a fully responsive multi-page website integrating real-time weather data, interactive galleries, and visitor resources to create a comprehensive digital experience.
bullet_changes.revised_text: Developed a fully responsive multi-page website integrating real-time weather data, interactive galleries, and visitor resources, resulting in a comprehensive digital experience with ~10,000 monthly visitors.
